item.title: 🇮🇷🇷🇺 Russia as Economic Lifeline for Iran amid Hormuz Blockade
item.description: Iranian FM Araghchi visited St Petersburg to discuss sanctions and Hormuz with Putin, as Tehran explores railway and Caspian trade networks to bypass Gulf disruptions. Experts say Moscow could offer a lifeline but logistical issues and costs offer little long-term incentive.

item.title: 🌍🌡️ Europe Named Fastest-Warming Continent in UN Climate Report
item.description: World Meteorological Organization reports Europe experienced above-average temperatures in 2025, with record marine heatwaves and wildfires burning over 1 million hectares. Nearly 70% of European rivers recorded below-average annual flows.

item.title: 🇨🇳🚗 China Suspends New Autonomous Driving Permits After Baidu Incident
item.description: Beijing halted issuance of new robotaxi licenses after about 200 driverless vehicles suddenly stopped in Wuhan in March. The move clouds the outlook for China's autonomous vehicle sector.

item.title: 🇲🇽🇺🇸 Mexico Opens Investigation into Unauthorized CIA Agents in Country
item.description: Mexico's attorney general announced a full probe into two US CIA agents who died in a car crash while operating in the country without authorization. The incident raises questions about US intelligence activities in Mexico.

item.title: 🇦🇺🛢️ Australian State Launches First Gas Tender in a Decade
item.description: New South Wales opened its first natural gas exploration tender in ten years amid supply crunch from Middle East war. Entry fees were slashed from A$50,000 to A$1,000 to encourage participation. Queensland also pushed for fast-track approval of first new oil project in 50 years.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Russia Cancels Military Equipment Display at Victory Day Parade Due to Ukraine War Losses
item.description: Moscow will exclude military equipment from its May 9 celebrations, citing the 'current operational situation' as Ukraine war grinds on.

item.title: ⚡ World Bank Warns Energy Prices Could Surge 24% in 2026 Due to Iran War
item.description: The World Bank forecasts a significant spike in global energy prices as the US-Iran conflict disrupts oil supplies through the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: 🇹🇼 Taiwan Coast Guard Chief Visits Disputed South China Sea Islet Despite Vietnam Protests
item.description: Taiwan's coast guard chief visited a contested feature in the Spratly Islands, drawing protests from Vietnam and highlighting escalating tensions.

item.title: 🇵🇭 Philippines Defense Chief Says Iran War Won't Distract US from Indo-Pacific
item.description: Top Philippine defense official says US remains committed to Indo-Pacific despite Iran conflict, with no signs of strategic pivot.

item.title: 🇸🇩 Five Million Children in Darfur Face Extreme Hunger and Violence as Sudan War Enters Fourth Year
item.description: UN warns of humanitarian catastrophe in Darfur region as Sudan's civil war continues devastating civilian populations.

item.title: ⚖️ Purdue Pharma sentenced to $5.5B, OxyContin maker to dissolve
item.description: OxyContin maker Purdue Pharma sentenced to pay billions and dissolve as part of opioid crisis settlement.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran IRGC tightens grip as war strains economy and blunts Supreme Leader role
item.description: Iran's Revolutionary Guard Corps consolidates power as wartime pressures reshape the country's political structure.

item.title: 🇮🇱⚔️ Hezbollah drone kills Israeli contractor in southern Lebanon
item.description: An Israeli contractor was killed and his son wounded by a Hezbollah drone attack in southern Lebanon, amid ongoing tensions despite ceasefire talks.

item.title: 🇪🇺🤝 US and NATO face frustrating marriage crisis, Belgian defense minister says
item.description: Belgian defense minister describes transatlantic relationship tensions as both sides navigate evolving security challenges.

item.title: 🇺🇸🏛️ US ties UN dues payment to China curbs, report reveals
item.description: US reportedly conditions UN funding on measures targeting China, highlighting growing tensions in international institutions.

item.title: 🇦🇪🛢️ UAE announces exit from OPEC and OPEC+ amid Iran war energy crisis
item.description: United Arab Emirates to leave oil cartel on May 1, stripping OPEC of one of its largest producers during global energy crisis.

item.title: 🇸🇩💔 Sexual violence in Sudan creates mental health crisis, UN warns
item.description: UN reports widespread sexual violence in Sudan conflict is creating a devastating mental health crisis among survivors.

item.title: ⚖️🇺🇸 Jury deliberates in trial of alleged ISIS militant charged in Kabul airport bombing
item.description: Jury deliberations begin in trial of alleged ISIS-K militant accused in the 2021 Kabul airport bombing that killed 13 US service members.

item.title: 🛢️ Oil prices surge as US moves to extend Iran port blockade
item.description: Oil prices rise sharply as US prepares to extend blockade of Iranian ports, prolonging Middle East supply disruption.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Trump says Iran in collapse, wants US to reopen Hormuz Strait
item.description: President Trump claims Iran is militarily defeated and seeking US help to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: 💸 US imposes sanctions on 35 entities for Iran sanctions evasion
item.description: US Treasury announces fresh sanctions targeting network of individuals and companies helping Iran evade international sanctions.

item.title: 📉 US bond markets split as Iran war tests Federal Reserve outlook
item.description: US bond markets show divergent signals as Middle East conflict creates uncertainty for Federal Reserve policy decisions.

item.title: 🚢 First Japan-linked tanker crosses Hormuz since Iran war began
item.description: Japanese VLCC Idemitsu Maru attempts Strait of Hormuz crossing, first Japan-linked tanker to navigate the waterway since conflict began.

item.title: 🇨🇳✈️ Chinese Scientists Pioneer Converting Carbon Dioxide Into Jet Fuel
item.description: Chinese researchers develop breakthrough technology to synthesize jet fuel from carbon dioxide as energy prices surge globally.

item.title: 🇯🇵🕌 Japan Faces Tensions Over Growing Muslim Communities and Mosque Construction
item.description: Japan grapples with integration challenges as Muslim population grows and mosque construction faces local opposition.
